title: Deck Dash
description: Sprint across an endless slide deck, dodging typos, pop-ups, and last-minute chaos.

title: Formula Firewall
description: Defend your spreadsheet from corrupted data errors marching across the grid.

title: Number Streak
description: Guess higher, lower, or draw across 10 escalating levels. Chain correct guesses for a growing score multiplier.

title: Card Memory
description: Match each emoji to its English word across 5 escalating stages — animals, flags, then total chaos.

title: Paycheck Python
description: Eat money to grow strong and dodge your workload — walls, your own tail, and office obstacles all end the run.

title: 오늘의 고양이
description: 평일 8:40~9:20 사이에 시작하는 하루짜리 고양이 케어 — 근무시간 동안 틈틈이 챙겨주고, 오후 6시에 마음을 담은 메시지를 받아보세요.
style: 일러스트 캔버스 UI, 실시간 비동기 육성
